source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Clear product UI typography with structured numerals and Japanese guidance tuned for documentation, reference, and knowledge tools.
layout: Layered translucent panels, 8px radius, precise documentation grids, warm cave-brown borders, and subtle calcite cleavage texture.

prompts.label: Transparent calcite motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Calcite transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a calcite crystal motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete mineral subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural calcite cave deposit crystal cluster, transparent to translucent honey-cream rhombohedral calcite crystals with clear glassy facets, warm cave-brown matrix at the base, pale cream inclusions, subtle internal cleavage planes, crisp mineral edges, and geological accuracy. It should feel like a documentation-system mascot object, not jewelry or fantasy treasure.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full crystal mass and base without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves clear honey cream translucency and facet detail; no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jewelry setting, no cave landscape, no hand, no props, no text, no watermark, no geode, no unrelated minerals dominating, no fantasy glow, no floor plane, no shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Calcite light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Calcite", derived from a calcite cave-deposit crystal motif. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible transparent documentation system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, at least 2400px wide if possible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Calcite, Calcite, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from transparent honey-cream calcite crystals, clear glassy facets, milky inclusions, warm cave-brown matrix, and rhombohedral cleavage planes. The board must read as calcite cave deposit and transparent documentation system, not generic beige SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Documentation Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: transparent documentation system, shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, clear layered panels, 8px radius, honey cream primary actions, mineral glass highlights, cave brown ink, pale cream surfaces, warm limestone borders, precise grid, subtle crystalline refraction texture, calm accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Clear Veil, Cave Ink, Honey Facet, Cream Cleavage, Limestone Glass, Cave Brown, Mineral Milk, Dust Vein, Amber Depth.
Constraints: no jewelry, no treasure cave fantasy, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Calcite", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Calcite dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Calcite". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from a calcite cave-deposit crystal motif.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, at least 2400px wide if possible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Calcite, Calcite, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve transparent honey-cream active states, clear calcite highlights, warm cave-brown matrix borders, rhombohedral cleavage texture, layered documentation spacing, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as calcite cave deposit and transparent documentation system, not generic brown SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Documentation Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep cave ink and amber-depth dark backgrounds, translucent mineral-glass cards, cream foreground text, honey facet buttons, limestone glass highlights, dust vein muted panels, cave brown borders, subtle crystalline refraction texture, calm documentation tone, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Clear Veil, Cave Ink, Honey Facet, Cream Cleavage, Limestone Glass, Cave Brown, Mineral Milk, Dust Vein, Amber Depth.
Constraints: no jewelry, no treasure cave fantasy, no neon, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Calcite".
